title: Personal user - no tenant data in the mobile app
scenario: Guest user without tenant sees "None" for Tenant name, Tenant ID, and User ID, and "Unknown" for Last connected in Poly Studio Mobile app Support screen
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Log in as a Guest (personal user with no tenant).
3. Navigate to Poly Lens Menu → Support → App.
4. Observe the Tenant name, Tenant ID, and User ID fields.
expected: For a personal user (no tenant), the Tenant name, Tenant ID, and User ID fields should display appropriate values (e.g., "N/A" or be hidden), and the "Last connected" field should show a valid timestamp or "N/A".
